title: Can You Get Into Berghain?
lead: Test your Berlin clubbing instincts against the world's strictest door.

questions.question: First, choose your outfit for the night.
How many people are you queuing with?

options.text: Four, but we'll split up at the door.
A group of seven guys on a weekend trip.

questions.question: You're in the queue. It's a 3-hour wait. What are you doing?

options.text: Taking a selfie with the building.
Laughing loudly and talking in English.

questions.question: You reach the front. The bouncer looks at you. 'Wer legt heute auf?' (Who's DJing?)

options.text: I don't know the lineup, I just want to dance.
I'm on the guest list, check the iPad.

questions.question: He nods slightly. 'Warum wollt ihr rein?' (Why do you want to come in?)

options.text: To see the famous club inside.

success.title: Viel Spaß.
success.message: He gestures you in. You survived the world's hardest door policy.

fail.title: Heute leider nicht.
fail.message: He shakes his head and points to the exit path. Not tonight. Better luck next Sunday.
